title: EKG Technician
description:
The Broad Institute advances biomedical research through genomic science. Our research has pioneered breakthroughs in cancer, infectious disease, and stem cell biology.

We're seeking a EKG Technician to join our Research team in Palo Alto. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Perform electrocardiogram tests and operate EKG equipment
Prepare patients for EKG testing and explain procedures
Ensure accurate electrode placement and signal quality
Maintain equipment and perform routine calibration
Document test results and communicate findings to physicians
Maintain patient privacy and comply with infection control standards

requirements.education: High school diploma or GED; EKG technician certification preferred
requirements.experience_years: 0-2 years in clinical testing or EKG operations
